notes: Daemon defaults to sessionScope: "single", so N successive createOrAttachSession calls against the same workspace return the same sessionId. RSS scaling and MCP amplification metrics here reflect "N attaches to one shared session", not "N distinct sessions".

After Wave 2 PR 5 (per-request sessionScope override) lands, this harness will be updated to optionally pass sessionScope: "thread" so the same metrics expose per-session cost and surface the P1 MCP N×M amplification before M2 fixes it.

promptLatency.skipReason: No recognized model credential env var is set; prompt latency requires real model access. Set QWEN_BASELINE_ENABLE_PROMPT_LATENCY=1 to force-run with non-env auth.
